English.Program_Short_Description: The World's Strongest Image Compression Algorithm
English.Program_Description:
The World's Strongest Image Compression Algorithm.
ETK Image Compressor Pro is a next‑generation compression engine built with a fully custom algorithm designed to deliver unmatched performance and quality. It dramatically reduces image file sizes while preserving visual clarity, making it ideal for photographers, designers, developers, and everyday users.
Key Features: - Up to 90% file size reduction with minimal visible quality loss - Full support for ultra‑high‑resolution images up to 8K (7680×4320) - Advanced output formats: PNG, WebP, TGA, EXR - Faster, cleaner, and smarter compression workflow - Fully offline operation — zero uploads, zero privacy risk - Optimized to run smoothly even on older or low‑spec systems - Proven superiority through side‑by‑side comparison tests
English.Keywords: image compressor, photo optimizer, jpg compressor, png compressor, image size reducer, batch image compression, fast image compressor, offline image compressor, ETK Image Compressor Pro, 8K compression, WebP compressor, EXR compressor, TGA compressor

Legal_Info.EULA_Text: This software is provided as-is without warranty. ETK Software retains all rights.
